# Form Builder â€” Vars

Var definitions are derived from `module.lowdefy.yaml`. Pass these via the `vars:` block in your app's `lowdefy.yaml` entry for this module.

## Summary

| Name | Type | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `elements` | array |  | Yes | The editable targets â€” one entry per piece of form config a user can build. Each item is `{ id, title, description }`, where `id` is the `_id` of the document stored in the elements collection (and the `elementId` a consumer passes to the dynamic-element component). Drives the `all` page listing and the `edit` page URL (`edit?id=<id>`). |
| `collection` | string | `dynamic-elements` |  | MongoDB collection storing each element's built config document. |
| `conversations_collection` | string | `dynamic-element-conversations` |  | MongoDB collection storing one AI-assistant conversation thread per (element, block), keyed by `${elementId}:${blockId}`. |
| `agent` | object |  |  | Configuration for the `builder` AIGatewayAgent that assists with block config. |
| `docs` | object |  |  | Where the builder agent fetches official per-block Lowdefy documentation for its `get-block-docs` tool. The Lowdefy docs site serves every docs page as raw markdown, so the agent can verify a block's properties before writing config. |
| `palette` | object |  |  | Block palette passed through to the FormBuilder block and used as the default `types` bundle for the dynamic-element component. |

## Nested var details

### `agent`

Configuration for the `builder` AIGatewayAgent that assists with block config.

| Name | Type | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `model` | string | `anthropic/claude-sonnet-5` |  | Vercel AI Gateway model id (creator/model form) the builder agent runs on, e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-5. |
| `max_steps` | number | `10` |  | Maximum tool-loop steps the builder agent may take per turn. |

### `docs`

Where the builder agent fetches official per-block Lowdefy documentation for its `get-block-docs` tool. The Lowdefy docs site serves every docs page as raw markdown, so the agent can verify a block's properties before writing config.

| Name | Type | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `base_url` | string | `https://docs.lowdefy.com` |  | Base URL of the Lowdefy documentation site that serves raw block markdown (no trailing slash). |
| `block_path` | string | `/md/{section}/{type}.md` |  | Path template appended to `base_url` to fetch a block's markdown. `{type}` is replaced with the lower-cased block type (TextInput -> textinput) and `{section}` with each block-docs section in turn (`input-blocks`, `display-blocks`, `container-blocks`, `list-blocks`) until a doc is found â€” matching the docs site's `/md/{section}/{slug}.md` raw-markdown scheme. |

### `palette`

Block palette passed through to the FormBuilder block and used as the default `types` bundle for the dynamic-element component.

| Name | Type | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `blocks` | array |  |  | Allowed block type names shown in the builder palette. Leave unset to accept the FormBuilder block's curated form-relevant default list. |
